experience_description: Engineered and optimized scalable web applications using Flutter, and Angular, improving application load times and establishing highly maintainable codebases.

Partnered with cross-functional teams (Back-End, Business Analyst, QA, and Manager) throughout the SDLC to translate complex business requirements into high-fidelity, user-centric features, accelerating feature delivery.
Implement API integration and support end-to-end application development aligned with enterprise application standards.
Build and optimize cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter with thousands of active users, ensuring application performance, security and maintainability.
Spearheaded the end-to-end SDLC, from architectural design to successfully launching 16 applications on the Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
Work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure scalable, high-quality, and user-focused solutions.
Engineered and maintained scalable web applications using PHP and MySQL, ensuring performance and reliability.
Implement API integration, troubleshoot issues, and perform debugging to support application stability.
Authored comprehensive technical documentation to support development and system understanding.
Deliver technical guidance in programming and information systems practicums.
Perform hardware and software maintenance, ensuring reliable lab operations.
Troubleshoot technical issues and support overall laboratory IT activities.
Helping lecturers and students to facilitate teaching and learning activities
